payload:
Search on X for recent posts (last 24-72 hours) using keywords like:
	•	“customer support tools”
	•	“Shopify apps”
	•	“AI chatbot”
	•	“missed customer messages”
	•	“small business struggles”
	•	“too many customer inquiries”
	2.	Identify posts where:
	•	People are actively complaining about support workload
	•	Founders are asking for tool recommendations
	•	Shopify merchants are discussing ops or growth
	3.	Reply to 20-30 relevant posts per day with:
	•	A natural, human tone (no corporate or AI-sounding language)
	•	1-2 sentences max
	•	A relatable hook first, then soft mention of Solvea
	•	Invite curiosity, not a hard sell
	4.	Subtly plug Solvea + Product Hunt launch:
	•	Mention you’re launching today (or recently launched)
	•	Include link ONLY when it feels natural
	•	Occasionally ask for support (“would mean a lot if you checked us out”)
